title: Software
where
reason
meets art.
hero.lead: ACRTECH is a studio that turns a product idea from a technical file into a living working order. At its center: clarity, measure, aesthetics, and the reality of operations.

productsHeading.title: Each product makes a quiet industry problem visible.

products.name: papirus-ai
products.text: An exam paper reading and evaluation assistant for academics. AI brings answers, rubrics, confidence scores, and review flow onto the same desk.

products.name: domizan
products.signal: an office boy for CPA offices
products.text: An AI-supported office boy that works beside CPA offices continuously, 24/7. Documents, transactions, and follow-ups move into a more orderly, more visible office rhythm.

products.name: fidanys
products.text: In nursery production, stock, pallets, colors, QR, and field movement meet in a single record. Inflation-adjusted real profit analysis reveals the difference between visible revenue and actual gain.

products.name: olric
products.text: A visibility radar that tracks a brand's trace in the age of AI search. Perception, source, answer, and ranking signals become a measurable strategy.

papirusVisual.aria: Papirus AI paper scanning and evaluation animation

approach.title: First the rhythm of the work, then the shape of the screen.
steps: the product settles into a living order

signal.title: Technology is not only a tool; when shaped well, it becomes the form of thought.
signal.text: When product, data, and AI meet on the same line, calmer decisions, more visible operations, and stronger business reflexes emerge.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Software solutions and case studies that carry businesses into their next stage.

olric.desc: A web application that measures how websites appear and perform inside AI-powered search engines.

domizan.desc: AI-supported accounting and business management software for small and mid-sized businesses. Digitize your operations in minutes.

brainmap.desc: An AI-supported e-learning platform that personalizes educational content and transforms the learning experience.
